Added custom hotkey support. Check out the hotkey section in Settings -> Hotkeys
Added a useful /help command that displays available commands, as well as an !mp set cheat sheet
Fixed a bug where the login screen would load endlessly if you entered a wrong password
From now on, chat4osu won't forcibly close on you when an update was downloaded
Scroll through your message history with the up and down arrow keys
Hide the empty user list when inside a PM tab
